description: First live composition of the Phase-0 validators against the real pinned GPTQ artifact (small admission files staged into an isolated cache; no GPU, no weights loaded, no model instantiated). Aggregate-only: booleans, counts, layout label; no raw config values, token IDs, fixture text, module names, or local paths.

live_results.load_manifest_blocked_reason: parameter-shape evidence is mandatory; shapes require safetensors headers (weight-side staging), not present at small-file stage

artifact_structure_discovered.note: real weight-index-derived module set; counts only, no module names committed

evidence_driven_correction_this_cycle.finding: the real pinned Qwen tokenizer defines bos_token_id=None (no BOS)
evidence_driven_correction_this_cycle.fix: complete_tokenizer_admission now binds BOS/EOS/PAD to the independently-derived expected id by equality (None==None admits a legitimately-absent token); a substituted or dropped id still fails; a _SENTINEL default distinguishes 'not supplied' (raises) from a genuine null expectation

open_gates: independent source-derived allow-list vs weight-index admitted set (currently self-compared; needs meta-device module enumeration of the text-only class)
mandatory parameter shapes require reading safetensors headers (weight-side staging)
weight staging + immutable checksum reconciliation of the 14 large shards (22.74 GiB)
wire the composition + integration tests through one final overall conjunction
privacy: aggregate-only; no raw config values, token IDs, fixture text, module names, weights, caches, or local paths
